price: Siehst du nicht, wie dein Herr mit den Leuten des Elefanten verfuhr?
arabic: أَلَمۡ تَرَ كَيۡفَ فَعَلَ رَبُّكَ بِأَصۡحَٰبِ ٱلۡفِيلِ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: alam tara kayfa faʿala rabbuka bi-aṣḥābi al-fīli
